title: TURNING POINT COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER/FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: TURNING POINT COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER TURNING POINT COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER/FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hosts a food pantry that also provides rental assistance for eviction prevention when funding is available, utility assistance, rental deposit assistance, prescription expense assistance, clothing, gas vouchers for medical appointments, and a thrift store. Offers application assistance for OHP,SNAP,TANF, LIHEAP, and Community Action Team (CAT) Housing Solutions. Access to faxing, scanning, emailing, and printing services. 220 E Columbia River Highway Clatskanie, OR 97016 Eligibility: Must meet USDA income guidelines for food pantry program Hours: Client Services: Monday 10am-12pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm Food Pantry: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 11am-2:30pm Thrift Store: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm Email (503) 728-3126 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 728-3126 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: -None for services -Thrift store items vary DOCUMENTS: Food boxes: Verification of physical address All other services: Verification of income AREA SERVED: Zip code 97016 Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Electric Service Payment Assistance Food Pantries Gas Money Mortgage Payment Assistance Prescription Expense Assistance Rent Payment Assistance Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TURNING POINT COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER
